title: Option for PDF's to be attachments opposed to links?
excerpt: Hello! I searched and found lots on PDF feature requests, but not this one specifically. I have several U.S. clients using Monday.com Emails & Activities feature to execute their federal government outreach. In attemptin…

posts.author: GovConHacks (Ashley Duwel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I searched and found lots on PDF feature requests, but not this one specifically. I have several U.S. clients using Monday.com Emails & Activities feature to execute their federal government outreach. In attempting to attach their PDF to their emails, they are receiving feedback from government personnel that due to cybersecurity, they are not able to click on the linked attachment.

Is there an existing way or a feature I can request to be able to choose to attach as attachment versus a link?

If this was available, the clients would not have to leave Monday to resend the attachment via their Outlook/ GMail. Having to do this makes the Emails & Activities redundant for this targeted market.

Thanks in advance!
